title: A wall in my room
summary: Describe one wall in your room — what is on it, what it looks like, and why you like it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about one wall in your room. Say what is on it, what the things look like, and why you like that wall. Use present simple and prepositions of place.
hintStarters: There is a wall in my room that I really like. On it, there is…
I put a… on the wall because…
The wall is next to my… and it makes me feel…
sampleText: There is a wall in my room that I like very much. It is the wall above my bed. The wall is painted light yellow. In the middle of the wall, there is a large poster of a mountain. The poster is black and white. On the left side, I have a small wooden shelf. On the shelf, there are three books and one small plant. On the right side, there is a photograph of my family. I put it there two years ago. At the top of the wall, there is a calendar. I use the calendar every day to check the date. I also pinned a small paper with my weekly plan on the lower part of the wall. The wall is not very big, but it has many things I like. Every morning I look at the photograph and I feel happy. The poster also makes me want to travel one day.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: in the middle of the wall

sampleGrammarNotes.title: There is / There are
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'there is' với danh từ số ít và 'there are' với danh từ số nhiều để mô tả những gì có ở một nơi: 'There is a poster', 'There are three books'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'there is' with singular nouns and 'there are' with plural nouns: 'There is a poster', 'There are three books'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Prepositions of place
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'on', 'above', 'in the middle of', 'on the left side' để mô tả vị trí của đồ vật trên tường.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use prepositions like 'on', 'above', 'in the middle of', 'on the left side' to say where things are on the wall.

sampleTranslationVi: Có một bức tường trong phòng tôi mà tôi rất thích. Đó là bức tường phía trên giường tôi. Tường được sơn màu vàng nhạt. Ở giữa bức tường có một tấm poster lớn hình ngọn núi. Poster là màu đen trắng. Ở phía bên trái, tôi có một chiếc kệ gỗ nhỏ. Trên kệ có ba cuốn sách và một cây nhỏ. Ở phía bên phải có một bức ảnh gia đình tôi. Tôi đặt ảnh đó lên đó hai năm trước. Phía trên cùng của tường có một tờ lịch. Tôi dùng lịch mỗi ngày để kiểm tra ngày tháng. Tôi cũng ghim một tờ giấy nhỏ ghi kế hoạch hàng tuần ở phần dưới của tường. Bức tường không lớn lắm nhưng có nhiều thứ tôi thích. Mỗi sáng tôi nhìn vào bức ảnh và cảm thấy vui. Tấm poster cũng khiến tôi muốn đi du lịch một ngày nào đó.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where is the wall the writer describes?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It is the wall above my bed'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for where the wall is in relation to the bed.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The wall is painted light yellow'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the colour word that describes the wall's paint.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is in the middle of the wall?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'In the middle of the wall, there is a large poster'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for what is in the central position on the wall.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is on the small wooden shelf?
options: Three books and one small plant
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'On the shelf, there are three books and one small plant'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the items on the shelf.

options: There is three books on the shelf.
There are a poster on the wall.
There is a calendar at the top.
There are a plant on the shelf.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'there is' is used with singular nouns: 'there is a calendar'.
mcQuestions.hint: Check which option uses 'there is' with a singular noun.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where is the photograph of the family?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'On the right side, there is a photograph of my family'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the side where the photograph is placed.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer use the calendar for?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I use the calendar every day to check the date'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the reason the writer looks at the calendar.

mcQuestions.prompt: When does the writer look at the photograph?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'Every morning I look at the photograph'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the time of day mentioned near the photograph.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which preposition fits: 'The poster is ___ the middle of the wall.'
mcQuestions.explanation: We say 'in the middle' — 'in' is the correct preposition here.
mcQuestions.hint: Think about what preposition goes with 'the middle'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the poster make the writer want to do?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The poster also makes me want to travel one day'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the wish the poster gives the writer.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do people put personal things like photos and posters on their walls? What do these things say about who they are?
